mapper.select: select count(distinct user_seq, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y%m%d')) from login_log where DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{startYYMMdd} and #{endYYMMdd}

select DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y%m%d') as date, count(distinct user_seq) as count from login_log where DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{startYYMMdd} and #{endYYMMdd} group by DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y%m%d')
mapper.insert: insert login_log ( ip, tc_id, error_message, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{ip}, #{tcId}, #{errorMessge}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
insert login_log ( ip, user_seq, tc_id, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{ip}, #{userSeq}, #{username}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
